rules: Always read CLAUDE.md first before making any changes
Never modify components/ui/ - shadcn/ui generated (use npx shadcn@latest add)
Always use createServiceClient() for DB writes in API routes
Always check if (!ai) before AI operations - client is null when GOOGLE_API_KEY missing
All tables use mkt_ prefix - never create tables without it
Every AI API call must log to mkt_usage_logs for cost tracking
Use parseAiJson() to parse Gemini responses (strips markdown code blocks)
Commit messages must be in English and descriptive
Use Turkish when communicating with the user
Use English for code comments and commit messages
Preserve existing code style and formatting
Run 'npm run build' before committing changes

hooks.command: case "$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" in */components/ui/*) echo 'BLOCKED: components/ui/ is shadcn-generated. Use npx shadcn@latest add <component>'; exit 2;; esac

case "$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" in */app/api/*/route.ts) echo '📋 API Route Checklist: 1)Auth(createSupabaseServer+getUser) 2)AI null check 3)Rate limit 4)Budget guard 5)Zod validation 6)Data fetch 7)AI call+parseAiJson 8)Save results 9)Log to mkt_usage_logs 10)Return response';; esac

case "$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" in */lib/ai/*|*/app/api/ai/*|*/app/api/generate/*) echo '💰 AI dosyasi duzenleniyor. Degisiklikler maliyet etkisi olabilir. /monitor-budget ile butce durumunu kontrol edin.';; esac
case "$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" in *.sql) echo '🔒 SQL Migration: mkt_ prefix kullanin, RLS aktif edin (ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY), auth.uid()=user_id policy ekleyin, rollback plani hazirlayin.';; esac

case "$TOOL_INPUT" in *'git commit'*) cd "/Volumes/SSD 2TB/APP/Newbee/NewbeeMarketing" && echo '🔍 Pre-commit kontrol...' && npm run lint --silent 2>&1 | tail -5 && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -10; if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo 'BLOCKED: Lint veya TypeScript hatalari var. Commit yapilamaz.'; exit 2; fi;; esac
